title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aptech Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aptech Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? Aptech Advisory Limited in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Aptech Advisory Limited:
Aptech Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech Advisory Limited!
